other_observers: David Dowell, Cathy Sheeter; agree with ID;
specific_location: Prewitt Reservoir, parking lot near dam, Washington County Side
description: A group of redpolls were feeding on weeds at Prewitt, in Washington County. Noted were small finches with red forehead, black chins, streaks beneath. The males were liberally washed in red-rose across chest. Exact breakdown by sex not known. Birds flew off shortly after being spottedBehaviors: See DescriptionCall: djit-djitPlumage: males and females
